Reason_for_Visit.summary: Stage III left breast cancer, local recurrence, to discuss treatment plan

Lab_Results.lab_summary: August 2018 - labs/markers - unremarkable, February 2018 - DXA = -2.0 / -1.0 / -1.8 (decreased c/w 2015)

Clinical_Findings.findings: Invasive ductal carcinoma 1.7cm, grade 3, extensive necrosis, margins negative; hypermetabolic tumor at lateral margin of left breast implant on PET-CT; 2 cm mass in left reconstructed breast on breast MRI; no palpable masses, no skin changes, no lymphadenopathy

Treatment_Goals.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.

Response_Assessment.response_assessment: No evidence of response to current treatment, but disease may be sensitive to hormonal therapy

hormonal therapy.Short term side_effects_discussed: thromboembolic phenomenon including DVT and PE

Therapy_plan.therapy_plan: Tamoxifen 20mg PO qD, referral to  for consultation, chest wall RT, return to clinic in 6 months
Therapy_plan.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.

Procedure_Plan.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.

Genetic_Testing_Plan.genetic_testing_plan: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.

Referral.Others: Physical or occupational therapy, Social work, financial counseling, home health
